creator: charlie@fox-hounds.co.uk
text:
/use/ports/www/joomla compile fails as the URL for Joomla_1.0.12-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2 is incorrect. The URL referenced appears to be password protected.

tfh# make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> Joomla_1.0.12-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/joomla.

Fix: 

the (or a) correct URL is http://joomlacode.org/gf/download/frsrelease/111/264/Joomla_1.0.12-Stable-Full_Package.tar.bz2
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/joomla && make
